Name: The ISF Academy
Tagline: Tomorrow’s education inspired by the spirit of innovation and world-shaping experiences of Nobel Laureate Professor Charles Kao as Founding Chairman.
About: The ISF Academy is a leading bilingual IB World School in Hong Kong, offering a unique blend of Eastern and Western educational philosophies. It emphasizes innovation and critical thinking, inspired by the legacy of Nobel Laureate Professor Charles Kao.
Philosophy: The ISF Academy's educational approach integrates inquiry-based learning with a strong bilingual curriculum, fostering global-mindedness and cultural fluency. It nurtures students to become independent thinkers and responsible global citizens, ready for diverse future challenges.
Outcomes: ISF celebrates outstanding International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP) results and an impressive range of tertiary education offers with the 68 graduates from the Class of 2023. Since graduating its first IBDP cohort in 2012, the size of the ISF graduating class has grown significantly.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply through an online application process, which includes submission of academic records and an interview. The admissions timeline typically begins in the fall, with offers made in the spring for the following academic year.
Quote: Nurturing global citizens through bilingual education, fostering curiosity, resilience, and a lifelong passion for learning.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The ISF Academy's faculty includes educators with advanced degrees from prestigious global universities and extensive IB training. Many teachers possess international teaching experience, enhancing their ability to deliver a rich, bilingual curriculum.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The ISF Academy offers comprehensive pastoral care and a dedicated counseling team to support student wellbeing. Regular wellness programs and community-building activities are integral to fostering a supportive school environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The ISF Academy's curriculum integrates the IB Diploma Programme with a strong emphasis on inquiry-based learning across subjects. Students benefit from a bilingual education that prepares them for global academic challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from The ISF Academy achieve high IB scores, with many securing places at top universities worldwide. The Class of 2023 received offers from Ivy League institutions and leading UK universities.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The ISF Academy boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including science labs, art studios, and a performing arts center. The campus also features a sports complex with a swimming pool and multiple courts.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The ISF Academy maintains rigorous academic standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. Continuous accreditation and internal reviews ensure the quality of education remains high.
